title: PACT Mediated Message
description: A message as delivered through the mediator. Content may be summarised, redacted, or blocked.

senderId.description: Registration ID of the sending agent.

senderDisplay.description: Display name of the sender (may be anonymised by mediator).

recipientId.description: Target agent, or null for broadcast.

deliveredContent.description: Content after mediation (may differ from original). Null when mediationAction is 'blocked'.

mediationAction.description: What the mediator did to the original content.

mediationReason.description: Why the mediator applied this action.

classificationLevel.description: Classification of the original content (e.g., 'official', 'protected', 'secret'). References the active classification framework.

acknowledged.description: Whether the recipient has acknowledged this message.
